description_long: This is a stylized adult female pedestrian figure with a slender build, standing upright with arms extended horizontally in a T-pose. She has shoulder-length, straight hair and a serious facial expression. Her outfit consists of a long-sleeved, fitted tunic dress with a deep V-neck, paired with form-fitting pants and knee-high boots. The clothing is simple and unadorned, emphasizing clean lines and a modern, urban look. The figure's proportions are realistic, and the surface finish is matte, giving a soft, non-reflective appearance. No accessories or carried objects are visible, and the overall design suggests a contemporary city dweller.
description: A stylized adult female pedestrian in a modern tunic dress, pants, and knee-high boots, standing upright with arms outstretched. The figure has shoulder-length straight hair and a matte, non-reflective finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the figure's facial features, V-neck tunic, and the full frontal outline of the boots and pants.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the face, the straight fall of the hair, and the layered look of the tunic over the pants.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head, the tunic's back, and the alignment of the boots and legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the profile and the smooth, uninterrupted lines of the outfit.
attribute_clothing_type: long-sleeved tunic dress with a deep V-neck, fitted pants, and knee-high boots
attribute_posture: standing upright with arms extended horizontally
